nodes.itemHTML: • Creative Coding with Canvas & WebGL - Workshop by Matt DesLauriers. that teaches you about generative art, interactive animations, 3D graphics, and shaders.
• Babylon.jsstars14k - complete JavaScript framework for building 3D games with HTML 5 and WebGL.
• Klakstars1.4k - A collection of scripts for creative coding with Unity.
• How to Start Learning Computer Graphics Programming - Advice and thoughts on how to get started by Eric Arnebäck.
• ASP.NET Core Interview Questions
• ParameterHandlerstars906 - Allows you to manage your ignored parameters when running a composer install or update.
• Toolystars99 - Manage needed PHAR files in your project composer.json. Every PHAR file will be saved in the composer binary directory. Optional with GPG verification for every PHAR.
• Melodystars403 - One-file composer scripts.
• validates_zipcodestars102 - Postal code / zipcode validation for Rails, supporting 233 country codes.
• Composer-MonoRepo-Pluginstars275 - The plugin helps to manage dependencies for multiple packages in a single repository.
• Composer-Shared-Package-Pluginstars169 - Allows you to share selected packages between your projects by creating symlinks.

• Composer-Custom-Directory-Installerstars119 - A composer plugin, to install different types of composer packages in custom directories outside the default composer installation path (vendor folder).
• PHPCodeSniffer-Composer-Installerstars309 - The plugin enables you to install PHP_CodeSnifferstars8.5k coding standards (rulesets).
• Composer-Servicestars175 - Enables you to run Composer as a service on a remote server.
• Graph-Composerstars741 - Provides a graph visualization for your project's composer.json and its dependencies.
• Composer-Patchesstars198 - Applies a patch from a local or remote file to any package that is part of a given composer project.
• Composer Registry Managerstars459 - Enables you to switch between different composer repositories.
• WordPress Packagist - Mirrors the WordPress plugin and theme directories as a Composer repository.
• Asset Packagist - Enables installation of Bower and NPM packages as native Composer packages.
• Drupal Packagist - Composer repositories for Drupal 7 and 8 core, modules, and themes.

• Satis Serverstars97 - This docker container provides a Satis Server and enables you to run a private, self-hosted Composer repository with support for Git, Mercurial, and Subversion, HTTP API, HTTPs support, webhook handler and scheduled builds.
• Release Beltstars134 - Self–hosted Composer repository implementation to quickly integrate ZIP files of third party non–Composer releases.
• Composer Best Practices 2018 - Nils Adermann @ phpday 2018
• Composer-Ignore-Pluginstars18 - Enables you to remove files and folders from the vendor folder (to make a cleaner and smaller deployment to production). It's an alternative to .gitattributes.
• PackageInfostars6 - Enables you to retrieve all package informations (like version, tag, release date, description).
• Composer-Yamlstars53 - This tool converts composer.yml to composer.json.
• Foxystars138 - Composer plugin that executes npm/yarn packages installation operations, when composer package is installed or updated.
• Web Components in Action - Book by Ben Farrell, available at Manning early release program.
• Web Component Essentials - Book by Cory Rylan, early preview edition available at Leanpub.
• iRedMail - Easy to install open source mail server solution
• Arstechnica - Tutorial on how to build your own email server
• Email Privacy Tester - A tool to test your email client's priacy features (loading remote content)

• GQLGenstars5.9k - Go generate based graphql server library.
• machinebox/graphqlstars699 - Simple low-level GraphQL client for Go
• GraphQL of Thrones - Total beginner tutorial focused on just GraphQL without all the tooling. Alternates between LEARN and PLAY modes roleplaying as Game of Thrones characters.
• type-o-ramastars221 - JS type systems interportability.
• tuqlstars536 - Automatically create a GraphQL server from any sqlite database.
• graffiti-todostars59 - Example Relay TodoMVC application using graffiti-mongoose. WARNING Graffiti is no longer actively maintained. For hobbyist only.

• relaystars15.7k - Relay is a JavaScript framework for building data-driven React applications.
• aws-amplifystars8k - A client library developed by Amazon for caching, analytics and more that includes a way to fetch GraphQL queries.
• FetchQLstars179 - A simple GraphQL query client using Fetch.
• urqlstars5.9k - A simple caching GraphQL client for React.

• micro-graphql-reactstars517 - A lightweight utility for adding GraphQL to React. components. Includes simple caching and uses GET requests that could additionally be cached through a service-worker.
• Lokkastars1.5k - Simple JavaScript client for GraphQL, which you can use anywhere.
• react-reachstars138 - A library to communicate with Graphql through Redux.
• graphene-djangostars3.5k - A Django integration for Graphene.
• Flask-GraphQL-Authstars57 - An authentication library for Flask inspired from flask-jwt-extended.
• Swagger to GraphQLstars821 - GraphQL types builder based on REST API described in Swagger. Allows to migrate to GraphQL from REST for 5 minutes
• GraphQL Voyagerstars6k - Represent any GraphQL API as an interactive graph.
• GraphQL Docs - Instantly create beautiful GraphQL API docs hosted online.
• ts-graphql-pluginstars491 - A language service plugin complete and validate GraphQL query in TypeScript template strings.
• Apollo Tracingstars420 - GraphQL extension that enables you to easily get resolver-level performance information as part of a GraphQL response.
• Altair GraphQL Clientstars3.3k - A beautiful feature-rich GraphQL Client for all platforms.
• Apollo Storybook Decoratorstars334 - Wrap your React Storybook stories with Apollo Client, provide mocks for isolated UI testing with GraphQL
• GraphQL Metrics - instrument GraphQL resolvers, logging response times and statuses (if there was an error or not) to the console as well as to InfluxDB.
• GraphQL Roverstars245 - GraphQL schema interactive navigation, rearrange nodes, search and explore types and fields.
• json-graphql-serverstars1.4k - Get a full fake GraphQL API with zero coding in less than 30 seconds, based on a JSON data file.
• RAN Toolkitstars2.1k - Production-ready toolkit/boilerplate with support for GraphQL, SSR, Hot-reload, CSS-in-JS, caching, and more.
• Apollo GraphQL VSCode Extension - Rich editor support for GraphQL client and server development that seamlessly integrates with the Apollo platform
• GameShell - A modular handheld game console that allows you to play & modify retro games and DIY new devices. Check the GameShell Docs for how to run PICO-8 on the GameShell.
• Slack - Share and help people on the chat. Get your invite here
• Join Monsterstars2.3k - A GraphQL-to-SQL query execution layer for batch data fetching.
• react-relay-network-layerstars275 - A network layer for Relay with query batching and middleware support (urlThunk, retryThunk, auth, defer and other).
• relay-subscriptionsstars182 - Subscription support for Relay.
• graphql-bundlestars36 - GraphQL Bundle for Symfony 2.
• gaphql-java-type-generatorstars35 - Auto-generates types for use with GraphQL Java
• graphql-spring-bootstars169 - GraphQL and GraphiQL Spring Framework Boot Starters.
• graphqlstars52 - GraphQL parser and server for Go.
• GraphQLstars815 - The Swift implementation for GraphQL.
• Dgraph - Scalable, distributed, low latency, high throughput Graph database with GraphQL as the query language
• swapi-graphqlstars936 - A GraphQL schema and server wrapping swapi.co.
• UniversalRelayBoilerplatestars698
• [to_eat_app] (https://github.com/jcdavison/to_eat_appstars12) - A sample graphql/rails/relay application with a related 3-part article series.

• Sample code on the BBS - the search is not 100% accurate, but some of those cards features some nice tricks you can re-use in your future code.
• Sprite Editor - External sprite editor compatible with Pico-8 and PicoLove.
• Color Palette - Hex and RGB colors codes for web.
• Mouse - How to retrieve mouse coordinates (with demo).
• SFX Modifications - Four effects that can only be applied by modifying memory (with demo).
• Tracker State/Audio Memory Locations - How to access and modify audio data as it is playing.
• Indie Retro News - A great introduction to PICO-8 by @ABrugsch.

• How I could have stolen your photos from Google - my first 3 bug bounty writeups - Written by @gergoturcsanyi.
• fzf-finderstars13 - Plugin to have a cool search keybinding with fzfstars36.6k and (optionally) batstars26.9k. Searches in the local tree of subdirectories for files.
• aws-mfastars2 - Plugin for AWS MFA.
